description_long: This is a compact blue hatchback car with a sporty, angular design and a two-door configuration. The body features a matte blue finish with black accents on the hood, bumpers, and side skirts, giving it a modern, urban appearance. The front end is equipped with rectangular headlights, a small grille, and a visible tow hook, while the rear showcases a red accent panel and a single exhaust pipe. The wheels are black with red brake calipers, suggesting a performance-oriented style. The windows are tinted dark, and the car has a rear hatch door for cargo access. The overall build is typical of a city car, designed for maneuverability and efficiency in urban environments.
description: A sporty blue two-door hatchback car with black accents, tinted windows, and a rear hatch door, featuring performance-style wheels and a compact urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular hood, rectangular headlights, small grille, and a visible red tow hook.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door layout, black side skirts, and detailed wheels with red brake calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red accent panel, tinted rear window, and single exhaust pipe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the two-door configuration and sporty wheel design.
